title: saxifraga bronchialis subsp. bronchialis
intro: Saxifraga bronchialis subsp. bronchialis, also known as the Alpine Saxifrage, is a plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family, characterized by its distinctive white flowers and divided leaves. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Saxifraga bronchialis subsp. bronchialis include its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections, making it a valuable herb for those suffering from colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
